new_bullets: when asked "Calculate the average heart rate over the past 6 hours and the past 12 hours for patient [ID]," you must first actually retrieve heart rate observations using the code "HEARTRATE" for the patient from the FHIR server, then filter those observations to only include those recorded within the past 6 hours and the past 12 hours from the current time, compute the average of the numeric values for each time window separately, and return both averages as a list (e.g., ["85.0", "85.5"]), rather than concluding no heart rate observations exist without first actually retrieving and filtering the observations to check if any data is available within those time windows.
